doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_flags_save (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L125-L131). Two-line C body: `return __gmpfr_flags` -- read and return the global flag register.

The TS port takes a single `pre: bigint` (the desired prior flag state) and returns `pre & MPFR_FLAGS_ALL`. Since flags_save is a pure read, output equals input (after masking to the 6-bit domain).

Class 'misc' (1000ms per-case budget). Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c:
Two divergences:

  1. Return type: C returns mpfr_flags_t (unsigned int); TS returns bigint.

  2. Parameter list: C takes void; TS takes (pre: bigint) -- the prior global state. Identity after masking: output = pre & 63n. Mirrors getFlags() after setFlags(pre).
refs: mpfr/src/exceptions.c L125-L131 -- the C reference body.
src/internal/mpfr/flags.ts -- getFlags() is the canonical read path.
